question_text:
Propose plausible immediate precursors for the target molecule.

Use the structured benchmark context below as the full task specification.
Return the best chemistry answer grounded only in this context.

<benchmark_context>
{
  "level": "B",
  "task_family": "Single-Step Retrosynthesis",
  "task_subtype": "immediate_precursor_prediction",
  "difficulty": "medium",
  "coverage_tags": [
    "precursor_set",
    "constraints",
    "procedure_context"
  ],
  "benchmark_suite": "B",
  "benchmark_subtrack": "B1",
  "planning_horizon": "single_step",
  "task_mode": "constrained_generation",
  "difficulty_proxies": [
    "precursor_count",
    "disconnection_obviousness",
    "procedure_context_constraints"
  ],
  "eval_contract_id": "level_b.plausible_immediate_precursor.v2",
  "expected_output_schema": "plausible_immediate_precursor_set",
  "judge_rubric_id": "g_eval.level_b.plausible_immediate_precursor.v2",
  "input": {
    "target": "N#Cc1cnc2c(-c3ccncc3)c(-c3ccc(F)cc3)nn2c1N"
  }
}
</benchmark_context>

Propose a multi-step synthesis route for the target molecule.

Use the structured benchmark context below as the full task specification.
Return the best chemistry answer grounded only in this context.

<benchmark_context>
{
  "level": "C",
  "task_family": "Multi-Step Synthesis Planning",
  "task_subtype": "reference_route_planning",
  "difficulty": "medium",
  "coverage_tags": [
    "route_depth",
    "branch_handling",
    "convergence",
    "reference_route"
  ],
  "benchmark_suite": "C",
  "benchmark_subtrack": "C2",
  "planning_horizon": "route_level",
  "task_mode": "open_planning",
  "difficulty_proxies": [
    "route_depth",
    "branching_and_convergence",
    "reference_route_alignment"
  ],
  "eval_contract_id": "legacy_eval_contract.full_synthesis.v1",
  "expected_output_schema": "reference_route_plan",
  "judge_rubric_id": "g_eval.full_synthesis.v1",
  "input": {
    "target": "Cc1onc2c1c(=O)n(C1CCCC(CNC(=O)OCc3ccccc3)C1)c1cnccc21"
  }
}
</benchmark_context>
student_answer: Step 1: Cyclization of 2-amino-3-hydroxynicotinic acid with acetic anhydride to form the fused methyl-isoxazole–pyridinone lactam core (NH form): Cc1onc2c1c(=O)[nH]c1cnccc21 | Step 2: Cbz protection of 3-(aminomethyl)cyclopentanol with benzyl chloroformate → 3-((Cbz)aminomethyl)cyclopentanol | Step 3: Activation of 3-((Cbz)aminomethyl)cyclopentanol with MsCl (or conversion to bromide) → 3-((Cbz)aminomethyl)cyclopentyl mesylate (or halide) | Step 4: N-alkylation of the lactam NH (from Step 1) with the cyclopentyl electrophile (from Step 3) under base-mediated conditions → target molecule Cc1onc2c1c(=O)n(C1CCCC(CNC(=O)OCc3ccccc3)C1)c1cnccc21
